title: Conversation Memory Management
description: Developer persists and retrieves multi-turn conversation history across requests using conversation stores and the RememberConversation middleware.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Application developer who configures agents with conversation persistence

actors.name: ConversationalAgent
actors.description: Any agent class using the RemembersConversations trait; satisfies the Conversational contract

actors.name: RememberConversation
actors.description: Middleware that auto-persists conversation turns after each agent response

actors.name: ConversationStore
actors.description: Interface for CRUD operations on conversations and messages; default impl: DatabaseConversationStore

actors.name: TextProvider
actors.description: AI provider used by RememberConversation to auto-generate a conversation title

use_cases.name: Start New Conversation for User
use_cases.description: Developer calls agent->forUser($user) to associate a user with a fresh conversation (conversationId = null).
use_cases.triggers: Developer sets up agent before first prompt

use_cases.name: Continue Existing Conversation
use_cases.description: Developer calls agent->continue($conversationId, $user) to resume a known conversation thread.
use_cases.triggers: Developer knows the conversation UUID from a previous interaction

use_cases.name: Resume Latest Conversation
use_cases.description: Developer calls agent->continueLastConversation($user); the trait resolves the most recent conversation UUID via ConversationStore.

use_cases.name: Retrieve Conversation History
use_cases.description: Agent exposes past messages via messages(); used internally when building the prompt context. Returns up to 100 messages by default.

use_cases.name: Auto-Persist Conversation Turn
use_cases.description: Middleware intercepts the post-response callback: creates a conversation record if none exists, then stores user and assistant messages.

use_cases.name: Auto-Generate Conversation Title
use_cases.description: On first message, RememberConversation calls the cheapest text model to produce a 3-5 word title. Falls back to truncated prompt on error.

use_cases.name: Store New Conversation Record
use_cases.description: Creates a row in agent_conversations with UUID7 id, user_id, title, timestamps.

use_cases.name: Store User Message
use_cases.description: Inserts a user-role row in agent_conversation_messages from AgentPrompt data (prompt text, attachments).

use_cases.name: Store Assistant Message
use_cases.description: Inserts an assistant-role row in agent_conversation_messages from AgentResponse (text, toolCalls, toolResults, usage, meta).
use_cases.impl: DatabaseConversationStore — role='assistant', content=response->text, tool_calls/tool_results/usage/meta as JSON

use_cases.name: Fetch Latest Conversation ID
use_cases.description: Queries agent_conversations ordered by updated_at desc to return the most recent conversation UUID for a user.

use_cases.name: Load Recent Messages into Prompt Context
use_cases.description: GeneratesText provider detects RemembersConversations trait and participant; if present, injects RememberConversation middleware automatically.
use_cases.trigger: GeneratesText::gatherMiddlewareFor() checks class_uses_recursive($agent) for RemembersConversations and $agent->hasConversationParticipant()

key_relationships: RemembersConversations (trait) implements Conversational interface via messages()
DatabaseConversationStore uses DB facade → agent_conversations + agent_conversation_messages tables
GeneratesText middleware pipeline: auto-inserts RememberConversation when agent has participant
important_notes: Middleware is auto-registered only if agent uses RemembersConversations trait AND has a conversationParticipant set
Default max conversation messages is 100 (overridable via maxConversationMessages())
getLatestConversationMessages reconstructs AssistantMessage+ToolResultMessage pairs from stored JSON
Title generation uses cheapest available text model; silently falls back to truncated prompt on failure
ConversationStore bound as singleton in service container by AiServiceProvider
